title: European Union Announces New AI Regulation Framework
description: The EU passes landmark legislation defining the future of Artificial Intelligence usage.

title: Markets Rally as Inflation Shows Signs of Cooling
description: Global markets respond positively as inflation continues to ease.

title: خوشحال عورت کی پہچان یہی ہے نیا پاکستان۔
